testcase.name: FIN-TC-1075: TC_427_Payment Orders_verify that user can select To Delivery date greater than From Delivery date
testcase.system-out: --------------Start the Financial Organization - Payment Order Details Testclass---------------------- ✅ Login process completed From Delivery Date="22-Jun-2026" | To Delivery Date="15-Jul-2026" (selected 15-Jul-2026)

testcase.name: FIN-TC-1076: TC_428_Payment Orders_verify that user can select same To Delivery date and From Delivery date
testcase.system-out: --------------Start the Financial Organization - Payment Order Details Testclass---------------------- ✅ Login process completed From Delivery Date="22-Jun-2026" | To Delivery Date="22-Jun-2026" (same date selected: 22-Jun-2026)

testcase.name: FIN-TC-1077: TC_429_Payment Orders_Verify that Batch Id textbox accept blank spaces
testcase.system-out: --------------Start the Financial Organization - Payment Order Details Testclass---------------------- ✅ Login process completed Batch Id textbox after entering blank spaces: "" (system rejected blank spaces as expected)

testcase.name: FIN-TC-1078: TC_430_Payment Orders_Verify that Batch Id textbox accept leading and trailing spaces
testcase.system-out: --------------Start the Financial Organization - Payment Order Details Testclass---------------------- ✅ Login process completed Batch Id input " 123 " → textbox shows "123" (system stripped leading/trailing spaces as expected)

testcase.name: FIN-TC-1079: TC_431_Payment Orders_verify that enter single alphabeat and click on search
testcase.system-out: --------------Start the Financial Organization - Payment Order Details Testclass---------------------- ✅ Login process completed Batch Id input "A" → textbox shows "" (system rejected alphabet as expected)

testcase.name: FIN-TC-1080: TC_432_Payment Orders_verify that enter single special charachter and click on search
testcase.system-out: --------------Start the Financial Organization - Payment Order Details Testclass---------------------- ✅ Login process completed Batch Id input "!" → textbox shows "" (system rejected special character as expected)

testcase.name: FIN-TC-1081: TC_433_Payment Orders_verify that enter number and blank spaces and click on search
testcase.system-out: --------------Start the Financial Organization - Payment Order Details Testclass---------------------- ✅ Login process completed Batch Id input "1 2 3" → textbox shows "123" (system stripped interleaved spaces, kept numbers) Search button clicked after entering numbers with blank spaces

testcase.name: FIN-TC-1082: TC_434_Payment Orders_verify that show only not delivered toggle button is displayed
testcase.system-out: --------------Start the Financial Organization - Payment Order Details Testclass---------------------- ✅ Login process completed Show Only Not Delivered toggle button is visible

testcase.name: FIN-TC-1083: TC_435_Payment Orders_verify that user can enable toggle button show only not delivered
testcase.system-out: --------------Start the Financial Organization - Payment Order Details Testclass---------------------- ✅ Login process completed Show Only Not Delivered toggle initial aria-checked: false Show Only Not Delivered toggle after click — aria-checked: true (enabled as expected)

testcase.name: FIN-TC-1084: TC_436_Payment Orders_verify that user can disable toggle button show only not delivered
testcase.system-out: --------------Start the Financial Organization - Payment Order Details Testclass---------------------- ✅ Login process completed Show Only Not Delivered toggle enabled (preparation step) Show Only Not Delivered toggle after second click — aria-checked: false (disabled as expected)

testcase.name: FIN-TC-1085: TC_437_Payment Orders_verify that Capitation toggle button is displayed
testcase.system-out: --------------Start the Financial Organization - Payment Order Details Testclass---------------------- ✅ Login process completed Capitation toggle button is visible

testcase.name: FIN-TC-1086: TC_438_Payment Orders_verify that user can enable toggle button Capitation
testcase.system-out: --------------Start the Financial Organization - Payment Order Details Testclass---------------------- ✅ Login process completed Capitation toggle initial aria-checked: false Capitation toggle after click — aria-checked: true (enabled as expected)

testcase.name: FIN-TC-1087: TC_439_Payment Orders_verify that user can disable toggle button Capitation
testcase.system-out: --------------Start the Financial Organization - Payment Order Details Testclass---------------------- ✅ Login process completed Capitation toggle enabled (preparation step) Capitation toggle after second click — aria-checked: false (disabled as expected)
